query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'intakeSessions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%oken%' OR (TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'intakeSessions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Token%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nDmGDeAWH8rbn85.abab35a8fbd4 --database bWMCToBMaWZYU8v22C5xF4 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'intakeSessions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%oken%' OR (TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'intakeSessions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Token%');
